complete.verificationSentDescription: Check your inbox to verify your account before signing in.
complete.verificationRequiredDescription: Your account was created and requires email verification before sign-in.
complete.createdDescription: Your account has been created. You can now sign in.

passwordRequest.title: Reset Password
passwordRequest.description: Enter your email or username to receive reset instructions.
passwordRequest.sentDescription: If an account exists for that email or username, reset instructions have been sent.

passwordReset.title: Choose a New Password
passwordReset.description: Set a new password for your account.
passwordReset.invalidLinkMessage: Reset link is invalid or incomplete.
passwordReset.expiredLinkMessage: This reset link is invalid, expired, or already used.

successToast.title: Password updated
successToast.description: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.

verify.invalidDescription: Verification link is invalid or incomplete.
verify.successDescription: Your account has been verified. You can now sign in.

protectedPage.title: Protected Access
protectedPage.description: Enter the page password to continue.

passwordPolicy.minLengthMessage: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordPolicy.maxLengthMessage: Password must be 128 characters or less
passwordPolicy.lowercaseMessage: Password must include a lowercase letter
passwordPolicy.uppercaseMessage: Password must include an uppercase letter
passwordPolicy.notSameAsCurrentMessage: New password must be different from current password
